title: schizachyrium littorale
intro: Schizachyrium littorale, also known as Little Bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Schizachyrium littorale include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Schizachyrium littorale can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
